_publications._publicationTitle: Suppression of proliferation of two independent NF1 malignant peripheral nerve sheath tumor cell lines by the pan-ErbB inhibitor CI-1033.

_contextSnippet: We found that 1 μM of gefitinib was sufficient to inhibit phosphorylation of the EGFR at Tyr1068, as well as EGF-induced activation of ERK
details: 1 μM was sufficient to inhibit phosphorylation of EGFR at Tyr1068 and EGF-induced ERK activation in all MPNST cell lines
